concepts: Full-stack web development (frontend and backend integration)
Responsive design and basic frontend UX principles
Working with HTTP, JSON, and web requests

soft_skills: Collaboration with designers and backend/frontend developers
Problem-solving across both frontend and backend issues
Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies
Time management and ability to handle multiple tasks
Attention to detail in both UI and backend logic
responsibilities: Develop and maintain full-stack web applications
Build user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks
Develop backend APIs and server-side logic
Integrate frontend components with backend services
Design and interact with databases for application data
Implement authentication and basic security features
Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code
Debug and resolve issues across the full stack
Participate in code reviews and apply feedback
Test application functionality to ensure reliability
Use Git for version control and collaboration
Work with senior developers to improve features and performance
